title: SubmitPreflightSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``submit-preflight`` composite primitive (WS5 #1).

Fans out to ``export-package`` + ``plan-throughput`` + ``validate-campaign``
concurrently. Replaces three independent ssh-bound CLI calls the agent
currently has to remember to sequence (the live-witnessed 2026-06-04
failure mode where the agent narrated "Running Step 0, plan-throughput,
validate-campaign in parallel" — convertible to one composite that owns
the parallelism). All three sub-calls share ``experiment_dir`` + ``cluster``;
the rest are pass-throughs to the respective sub-call.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory (per the standard hpc-agent convention).

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Cluster name from clusters.yaml; passed through to plan-throughput + validate-campaign.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Scheduler profile (sge / slurm / pbspro / torque); passed through to validate-campaign.

campaign_id.title: Campaign Id
campaign_id.description: Optional campaign slug; pass-through to validate-campaign for the stochastic-marker check.

expected_cmd_sha.title: Expected Cmd Sha
expected_cmd_sha.description: Required alongside ``campaign_id`` to enable validate-campaign's stochastic-marker check.

force_export.title: Force Export
force_export.description: Pass-through to export-package's ``--force`` (ignore the build cache).

skip.title: Skip
skip.description: Sub-calls to skip; useful for partial reruns. Empty list runs all three.

fanout_strategy.title: Fanout Strategy
fanout_strategy.description: Concurrency mode. ``asyncio`` runs the three concurrently (the speedup motivation); ``sequential`` runs them in series for debugging or rare network-saturation-sensitive clusters.

timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec
timeout_sec.description: Per-sub-call subprocess timeout. The default of 600s tolerates a slow export-package + cluster ssh; aggressive callers can lower it.
